'''Bo Vanda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sith alchemist/Legends|practitioner]] of [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]] in the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. She enjoyed [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] and performing cruel experiments on captured enemies, especially [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and this contributed to her immense knowledge of alchemy. She later created a [[Bo Vanda's holocron|holocron]] that was controlled by [[Kla (Sith)|Kla]] and also contained the knowledge of the warrior [[Komok-Da]].<ref name="TDSB" />
